name: linActivateFlashMode
title: linActivateFlashMode
description: This function activates flash mode on high-speed capable transceivers. Note that in flash mode such a transceiver will use faster rising and falling edges and will disregard the EMC limitations of the LIN network. Note also, that the activation of the flash mode cannot be done while the channel is transmitting or the scheduler is running.

parameters.name: activate
parameters.description: 1 will activate the flash mode, 0 will deactivated it.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
